text: 1 # sudo docker build -t system_health_check . 2 # sudo docker run -d -p 1024:1024 --rm -it system_health_check 3 4 FROM ubuntu:19.10 5 3 RUN apt-get update 7 8 RUN useradd -d /home/ctf/ -m -p ctf -s /bin/bash ctf 9 RUN echo "ctf:ctf" | chpassud 10 11 WORKDIR /home/ctf 12 13 COPY system_health_check . 14 COPY flag . 15 COPY ynetd . 16 17 RUN chown -R root:root /home/ctf 18 ) 1529025 2 EXPOSE 1024 2 CHD . /ynetd -p 1024 ./system_health_check
